description: Spec cites NFPA 20 for stationary fire-pump installation; verifier correctly confirmed with a grounded NFPA citation.

finding.issue: Specification cites NFPA 20 for the design and installation of the electric fire pump and its controller.

paragraph_map_slice.text: A. Design and install stationary fire pumps per NFPA 20.

captured_verifier_response.explanation: NFPA 20 'Standard for the Installation of Stationary Pumps for Fire Protection' is the authoritative reference for fire-pump installation and is referenced by the IBC/IFC. The citation is correct for a data-center fire-suppression package.

ground_truth.notes: NFPA 20 is the correct standard for stationary fire-pump installation.
